region_name: York and North Yorkshire Combined Authority
cluster_name: York and North Yorkshire Creative Industries
strap: York and North Yorkshire Creative Industries draws £863m of UKRI lead-led funding across 783 grants, anchored by Lancaster University (16%), York (15%).
behaviour: The cluster shows high-confidence "Forgiving instead of redesigning" and "Coordinating instead of deciding" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
